description: You are a collegiate track and field coach building a scoring dashboard for a regional decathlon. Using the raw event results at '~/Documents/Spreadsheets/decathlon_raw_results.csv' and the official World Athletics (IAAF) scoring parameters at '~/Documents/Spreadsheets/iaaf_parameters.csv', create an automated scoring workbook that calculates the point values for all 10 events for each athlete. Follow the mathematical rules detailed in '~/Documents/scoring_rules.txt' (utilizing INT and POWER functions) to determine event points, calculate the total score for each athlete, and identify the top three overall finishers. Save the completed workbook as '~/Documents/Spreadsheets/decathlon_scoring.xlsx'.
